description_long: This is a discarded Pepsi can, cylindrical in shape with a metallic silver top and bottom and a vibrant blue body. The can features the iconic Pepsi logo, consisting of a red, white, and blue sphere, along with bold white 'PEPSI' lettering wrapping around the upper portion. Nutritional facts and product information are printed in white on the blue background, visible on one side. The top of the can has a standard aluminum pull tab for opening, and the surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light. There are no visible dents, rust, or damage marks, and the can appears empty. The overall appearance is clean, with crisp branding and clear text.
description: A clean, empty Pepsi can with a blue body, silver top, and bold branding, featuring a glossy, undamaged surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large 'PEPSI' text and the red, white, and blue logo sphere prominently.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutrition facts and product information in white text on the blue background.
description_view_2: Rear view with the vertical 'PEPSI' text, logo sphere, and additional product details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with partial 'PEPSI' text and logo, less text detail visible.
attribute_brand_logo: Pepsi logo: a red, white, and blue sphere with bold white 'PEPSI' text.
attribute_label_text: PEPSI Nutrition Facts Serving Size 1 Can Amount Per Serving Calories 150 Total Fat 0g Sodium 30mg Total Carb. 41g Sugars 41g Protein 0g CONTAINS: CARBONATED WATER, HIGH FRUCTOSE CORN SYRUP, CARAMEL COLOR, SUGAR, PHOSPHORIC ACID, CAFFEINE, CITRIC ACID, NATURAL FLAVOR. PEPSI
